title: Default (Excel) import settings for each board

posts.author: mnigten (Michael Nigten)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Folks,

I have a board where we import data from Excel every day with the same settings. The excel is prepared for import with power query so the layout is always identical.
Everytime i have to select the column what will be the first column in Monday, then the check if the colums are correct and as last the option that i want to overwrite everything with a column selection.

I would like to have the option for that particulair import that the options are predefined so that i do not have to select everything everytime.

Thanks
